xBRIEFInfo.author: Viz
xBRIEFInfo.description: Wire inMemory() DurabilityBackend to channel Runtime for local/dev HTTP sessions

narratives.ProblemStatement: DurabilityBackend v1 ships inMemory() for port-level tests, but createAgentRuntime / channel Runtime still throws at boot when experimental.durability.backend is inMemory(). Authors cannot run HTTP-serving agents without @workflow/core.
narratives.Goals: G1: Implement createInMemoryRuntime() implementing run/deliver/getEventStream against DurabilityPort + SessionDriver/TurnDriver. G2: Flip runtime-factory branch for backend name inmemory. G3: Scenario test boots agent with inMemory() and exercises public session API without Workflow bundler. G4: Keep vercelWorkflow path unchanged.
narratives.NonGoals: NG1: Production durability guarantees for inMemory. NG2: Cross-replica or durable disk for inMemory. NG3: rivet/temporal adapters.
narratives.LockedDecisions: Deferred from research/durability-backend.md and deftai/eve#1 item 5. Production continues to warn unless EVE_ALLOW_INMEMORY_DURABILITY=1.
narratives.FunctionalRequirements: FR-1: createInMemoryRuntime must satisfy Runtime surface used by HTTP channel host. FR-2: Session park/resume via in-process inboxes. FR-3: Event stream readable via getEventStream. FR-4: Subagent child turns via startChildTurn on the in-memory port.
narratives.SuccessMetrics: SM-1: Unit/integration green. SM-2: New scenario boots with inMemory() backend. SM-3: Docs note that inMemory channel Runtime is supported for local/dev.
